author: Julien Lin
description: Open the current note in the CSDN Markdown editor and fill it through a local Chrome extension bridge. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Julien Lin
manifest.description: Open the current note in the CSDN Markdown editor and fill it through a local Chrome extension bridge.
manifest.name: CSDN Sync

name: CSDN Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Remove the CSS !important rule from the editor content script stylesheet and rely on clearing CSDN's inline title style before filling. This keeps the Obsidian community review free of CSS lint warnings for extension styles.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix Obsidian community review error by moving editor-fill content-script styles into a Chrome extension CSS asset declared in manifest.json. This removes runtime style-element creation from TypeScript source.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix Obsidian community review error by replacing direct static style assignments in the editor content script with injected CSS classes. No user-facing behavior change.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial release of CSDN Sync. Opens the current Obsidian note in the CSDN Markdown editor through a localhost bridge and companion Chrome extension. Includes title extraction, manual editor fill, token-protected local task API, and local image upload support.
